description.unified: Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for 7sec, increasing ATK by [302->333]*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion Chance by 300. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical DMG is increased by 2% for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
[Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.

On hit, increases the target’s Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by [100->{1}] for [?? sec->10 sec]. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by [{4}%->{2}%], and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
